summary: Benchmark scoring overhaul complete (7bf0853). Next session: validate fixes with smoke tests, then launch full benchmark run.

results.description: Fixed scoreRedundantRework to score 100 when B makes no changes and completion >= 67
Rewrote scoreContextAccuracyAutomated to assess tool calls (Read ops, coordination tools) not just diffs
Reduced Agent A timeout from 8min to 3min
Added BUG_RESOLUTION_TEMPLATE and wired into bug-investigation
Removed bug answer leak from Agent B prompt
Added CallbackRegistry competing pattern for architecture-cascade ambiguity
Baseline condition now keeps CLAUDE.md, only removes .claude/
Validation smoke tests — run each scenario to confirm score differentiation
results.notes: Run: yarn benchmark --scenarios context-recovery --conditions baseline,full-twining --runs 1 (verify context-accuracy/redundant-rework not always 0). Then bug-investigation (verify redundantInvestigation realistic). Then architecture-cascade (verify decisionPropagation not always 100). Then check CLAUDE.md present in baseline workdir.
